cards.judge.name: The Judge
cards.judge.flavor: He condemned even silence for looking suspicious.
cards.controladorCompulsivo.name: Compulsive Controller
cards.controladorCompulsivo.effect: Deals 2 damage and blocks the opponent's next card.
cards.controladorCompulsivo.flavor: Everything is under control, except the tiny detail of being alive.
cards.controladorCompulsivo.impact: Relax, I will ruin this methodically.
cards.sentenciaExpress.name: Express Sentence
cards.sentenciaExpress.effect: Deals 4 damage and applies a temporary block.
cards.sentenciaExpress.flavor: The emotional paperwork was rejected for existing.
cards.autoestimaConCasco.name: Self-Esteem Helmet
cards.autoestimaConCasco.effect: Clears 3 Mental Noise, gains 3 Clarity and recovers Willpower.
cards.autoestimaConCasco.flavor: Resistant to criticism, sarcasm and family meetings.
cards.autoestimaConCasco.impact: Today my own brain does not run me over.
factions.judge.name: The Judge
factions.judge.description: Internal prosecutor, dramatic hammer and zero objective evidence.
factions.controlador.name: Controller
factions.controlador.description: Order, method and a plan B for the plan B.
factions.controlador.tagline: Blocks, reduces options and calls it peace of mind.
keywords.sentence.name: Sentence
keywords.sentence.description: Extra damage if the opponent has high Stress.
keywords.chain.name: Chain
